title: Best Institute for MBA in Finance in Noida & Delhi NCR
content: The MBA (Financial Management) programme is a Two- Year full time post graduate professional programme in finance spread over four semesters leading to Master Degree in Finance designated as MBA (Financial Management). The MBA (Financial Management) programme at the School of Finance and Commerce has been designed to cater to the growing needs of corporate, banks, capital market, insurance, real estate, Multinationals, Government and Semi-Government organizations for qualified finance professionals. It is estimated that more than twenty lakhs jobs are likely to be created in next five to ten years in banking and financial sectors of Indian economy. The programme seeks to equip the participants with conceptual and analytical skills for financial decision making. The students are provided with necessary inputs in the basic areas of Managerial decision making such as Organizational Behavior, Managerial Economics, Quantitative techniques, Financial Accounting , Corporate Tax and Laws , and Information Technology, etc. and specialized knowledge and skills in various areas of Finance such as Corporate Finance, Capital Market, Investment Analysis and Portfolio Management, Equity Research, Financial Services, International Finance and Accounting , Financial Derivatives and Risk Management, Project Appraisal, etc. Bachelor Degree with Minimum 50% aggregate marks Students having MAT / XAT / CMAT / NMAT / GMAT/ CUET Score will be given preference in merit 01 Apply conceptual financial knowledge to solve practical decision-making problems, both individually and as part of teams using techniques such as case analysis, projects, and assignments. 02 Develop a systematic understanding of finance and its impact on people, businesses, and the economy. 03 Apply current techniques, skills, and tools necessary for financial practices and employability. 04 Identify and analyze a problem, and use the appropriate financial skills for obtaining its solution. 05 Demonstrate a critical awareness of market influences, increasing regulation, power of technology and social responsibility on function of finance. 06 Investigate complex and practical business problems using modern tools and techniques for sustainable financial development. 07 Apply knowledge of information technology effectively by scanning, organizing, synthesizing, and analyzing financial data in order to abstract meaning from information 08 Identify, formulate, and provide innovative solution framework to real world complex business and social problems by applying quantitative and qualitative problem-solving tools and techniques. 09 Developing effective presentation and communication in the business environment and the society at large. 10 Recognize and comply with financial ethics, standards, and values to sustain in the global financial environment. 01 The Graduates shall establish themselves as effective finance professionals by solving real problems through acquired critical financial management knowledge and techniques. 02 The Graduates shall exhibit the necessary skill i.e. Financial Modeling, Data Analytics and Fintech etc. for better employment opportunities. 03 The Graduates shall become life-long learners in advance research, and development of entrepreneurial skills in advanced areas of financial management. 01 Identify, formulate, analyze, and conclude the financial issues at global level to manage and achieve organizational objectives effectively and efficiently based on globally available data and through specialized financial softwares. 02 Comprehend the need, significance and methodology of financial decision making aimed at creating employment opportunities and develop continuous ethical learning throughout life.
